description_long: This is a modern, French-door refrigerator with a sleek black finish and a bottom freezer drawer. The front features two vertical doors with long, metallic handles and a digital control panel with an integrated water and ice dispenser on the left door. The overall design is boxy and robust, with smooth, flat side panels and a slightly protruding front section for the doors and handles. The control panel is illuminated with blue and white indicators, adding a high-tech touch. The refrigerator appears to be constructed primarily from metal with plastic and glass components, and the surface is smooth and slightly reflective. The brand logo is visible on the upper right corner of the right door.
description: A sleek black French-door refrigerator with a bottom freezer drawer, metallic handles, and a digital control panel with water and ice dispenser.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors, metallic handles, digital control panel, water/ice dispenser, and brand logo.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a flat, smooth black panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat black surface with no visible features or components.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a flat, smooth black panel similar to the left side, with no visible features.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular Samsung logo is visible on the upper right corner of the right door, in white text on a black background.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, metallic handles that protrude outward and are mounted on the front of each door and the freezer drawer.
